zh.lifeSummary: 當John Adams於1472年1月1日出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾貝福斯東時，他的父親Thomas Adams20歲，母親Jane Elizabeth Rannelegh18歲。他和Catherine Stebbing至少有3個兒子。他去世於1557年8月2日在他的家鄉享年85歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾聖 代維達斯 邱奇 艾米。

nameMeanings.name: Adams
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Dutch, and German (mainly northwestern Germany): patronymic from the personal name Adam . In North America, this surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Greek Adamopoulos , Serbian and Croatian Adamović (see Adamovich ), Polish (and Jewish) Adamski .
Irish and Scottish: adopted for McAdam or a Scottish variant of Adam , with excrescent -s.

History: This surname was borne by two early presidents of the US, father and son. They were descended from Henry Adams, who settled in Braintree, MA, in 1635/6, from Barton St. David, Somerset, England. The younger of them, John Quincy Adams (1767–1848) derived his middle name from his maternal grandmother's surname (see   Quincy  ). — Another important New England family, established mainly in NH, is descended from William Adams, who emigrated from Shropshire, England, to Dedham, MA, in 1628. James Hopkins Adams (1812–61), governor of SC, was unconnected with either of these families, his ancestry being Welsh; his forebears entered North America through PA.

variants.name: Adam
meanings: Ukrainian (standard transliteration Adamovych) and Belorussian: patronymic from the personal name Adam .
Americanized form of Serbian and Croatian Adamović, Slovak Adamovič, cognates of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When John Adams was born on 1 January 1472, in Beverston, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Adams, was 20 and his mother, Jane Elizabeth Rannelegh, was 18. He had at least 3 sons with Catherine Stebbing. He died on 2 August 1557, in his hometown, at the age of 85, and was buried in Saint David's Church Airmyn, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: John Adamsが1472年1月1日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアベバーストンで生まれた時，父Thomas Adamsは20歳，母Jane Elizabeth Ranneleghは18歳であった。彼はCatherine Stebbingとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼は1557年8月2日に故郷で85歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアサイント ダヴィド'ス チャーチ エイルムインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Adams(이)가 1472년 1월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 비버스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Adams(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Elizabeth Rannelegh(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Catherine Stebbing(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1557년 8월 2일 그의 고향에서 85세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 세인트 데이비드'스 처르치 어미에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Adams родился 1 января 1472 г. в местности бивирстон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Adams было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Elizabeth Rannelegh, 18. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына от Catherine Stebbing. Он умер 2 августа 1557 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 85 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт дэвид'с чурч эирмин, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Murió el 2 de agosto de 1557, en su pueblo, a la edad de 85 años, y fue sepultado en Saint David's Church Airmyn, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
